message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam actor {
  ArrowColor BLACK
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor BLACK
}
skinparam participant {
  ArrowColor BLACK
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor BLACK
}
skinparam database {
  ArrowColor BLACK
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor BLACK
}

actor "User" as User
participant "WebSite" as WebSite
participant "Server" as Server
database "phonebook" as phonebook

User -> WebSite : select contact
User -> WebSite : click button "DeleteContact"
activate WebSite
WebSite -> Server : deleteContact()
activate Server
Server -> phonebook : Update()
activate phonebook
phonebook --> Server : ok
deactivate phonebook
Server --> WebSite : ok
deactivate Server
deactivate WebSite
activate WebSite
WebSite -> Server : getAllContacts()
activate Server
Server -> phonebook : findAll()
activate phonebook
phonebook --> Server : ContactsList
deactivate phonebook
Server --> WebSite : ContactsList
deactivate Server
deactivate WebSite

@enduml
```
